name: com.ezg.power-rename
description: Editor window (menu Tools ▸ Power Rename) for batch-renaming selected project assets and scene GameObjects. Applies a prefix and suffix, trims characters from the start/end, runs a find & replace, capitalizes the first letter or each word, and can change an asset's file extension (e.g. .png → .psd) via AssetDatabase.MoveAsset. Optionally replaces the find/replace text inside a Project text file's content (binary files skipped). Renames scene objects with full Undo support and project assets through the AssetDatabase.
